basicDetails.implementingAgency: Uttarakhand Science Education And Research Centre (USERC)

schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to establish Digital Learning Platform to provide training and career counseling on various subjects, including ICT orientation, emerging technologies, and more, through both online and offline modes for students of secondary schools across the state.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Establishment of Digital Learning Platform” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Science Education and Research Centre (USERC) under the Department of Science and Technology, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to establish Digital Learning Platform to provide training and career counseling on various subjects, including ICT orientation, emerging technologies, and more, through both online and offline modes for students of secondary schools across the state.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under the Digital Learning Platform, students of secondary schools are provided with training and career counseling on various subjects, such as ICT orientation, emerging technologies, and more, through both online and offline modes.

children.text: The scheme “Establishment of Digital Learning Platform” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Science Education and Research Centre (USERC) under the Department of Science and Technology, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to establish Digital Learning Platform to provide training and career counseling on various subjects, including ICT orientation, emerging technologies, and more, through both online and offline modes for students of secondary schools across the state.

Under the Digital Learning Platform, students of secondary schools are provided with training and career counseling on various subjects, such as ICT orientation, emerging technologies, and more, through both online and offline modes.
A five- or seven-day training on digital technology shall be provided to students through both online and offline modes in various secondary schools across the state.

applicationProcess.process_md: A five- or seven-day training on digital technology shall be provided to students through both online and offline modes in various secondary schools across the state.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. All students studying in secondary schools across Uttarakhand are eligible.

children.text: 1. All students studying in secondary schools across Uttarakhand are eligible.
